entities.description: A category of crops often referred to as women's crops

entities.description: The difference in crop yields between female and male plot managers

entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: The country where the farm household survey was conducted

entities.description: The region where female plot managers often realize lower yields

entities.description: A statistical method used to decompose the factors contributing to the yield gap

entities.description: Groundnut varieties developed for better performance that increase yields for female plot managers

entities.description: Traditional groundnut varieties used in production

entities.description: Differences in labor application between female and male managers that explain the yield gap

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: A positive outcome resulting from closing the gender yield gap

entities.name: WOMEN'S INCOMES
